form_titulo: Let’s work together to make your project a reality!
descripcion_principal:
Software Developer
3+ years of experience. From San José, Costa Rica.
exp1_descripcion: I develop websites and web applications using modern technologies such as Astro, Node.js, Prisma ORM, and SQL databases. I am currently working on a website for a tattoo studio that includes a work gallery, image optimization with Cloudinary, Google authentication, and data management with MySQL. I have also developed multiple complete projects using Spring Boot, .NET, and React as part of university and personal projects.
exp2_descripcion: I participated in a backend development internship working on a WhatsApp automation API using Puppeteer. I collaborated with the team developing and testing endpoints related to WhatsApp sessions, as well as documenting and maintaining code within a private project.
exp3_descripcion: I developed an application for seniors that includes 8 interactive games designed for recreational centers. I worked in a team with senior developers using Angular and Spring Boot, participating from planning to the final implementation of the system. I implemented interactive games such as chess using TypeScript and external APIs.
exp4_titulo: Full Stack Developer - Hotel Booking System
exp4_descripcion: I developed a complete hotel booking system using Ruby on Rails, PostgreSQL, and Bootstrap. The system included user authentication, role management, reservation management, and administrative functionalities.
exp5_descripcion: I developed various personal and academic web projects while building experience as a developer. During this period, I worked with technologies such as React, .NET, Spring Boot, Node.js, and SQL databases, developing complete applications from frontend to backend.
proyecto2_descripcion: .NET application that consumes the Digimon API.
proyecto3_descripcion: Classic game with optimized logic and modern styles.
proyecto4_descripcion: Hotel reservation system with authentication and online payments.
proyecto5_descripcion: Medication and user management with Spring Boot and MVC.
proyecto6_descripcion: WhatsApp automation API with Puppeteer. Enterprise automated messaging system.
proyecto7_descripcion: Modern and visually appealing landing page for a tourist farm in Costa Rica. Includes photo gallery, tour information, WhatsApp integration and booking form.
proyecto8_descripcion: Personal portfolio developed with Astro and Tailwind CSS. Includes interactive effects, animations and responsive design.
proyecto_adrian_tattoo_descripcion: Professional website for a tattoo artist in Canada. Features work gallery, Google authentication, image management with Cloudinary, and robust backend with Prisma ORM.
